Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Looks like they cleared out the chairman's room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I just can't believe all this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}"Kirijo Group CEO Dies Suddenly." They're blaming it on an illness, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Kirijo-senpai's not here, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}She's an only child, so there's a lot to be settled, like the funeral and the family business.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}She'll probably have her hands full for at least a week.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That sounds rough. I hope she'll be okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}So, what're we supposed to do now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}No word yet. They're probably too busy to be thinking about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}In fact, the entire Kirijo Group must be in a state of panic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Man, I wanna hear what they have to say, but they haven't made a peep.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Am I supposed to just wait for them to get their act together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Mitsuru's meeting with the company execs. Might explain the delay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But still, what are we going to do?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}We have no idea how to get rid of the Dark Hour. We don't even know who to fight now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}He kept saying stuff about "the Fall."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}What would've happened if we were sacrificed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_019_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't want to think about it.

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Hm... So many unanswered questions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Yeah, but standin' around here isn't gonna solve anything, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}But there is one thing we know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Tartarus is still around, and Shadows are swarming the place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}We should train so we're ready for whatever we might be up against.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}All right, that's it for tonight. Try to get some rest, even if you can't sleep.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Umm, there were traces of a video on the chairman's PC.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}A lot was deleted, but I was able to restore some of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}And, well, I think it's something you need to see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Thanks, Fuuka. I'll be sure to watch this later.[n]{f 1 1}
